/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/YoloDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/OutputParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/Benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/SystemMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_benchmark.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o -o yolo_benchmark  -Wl,-rpath,/home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib: /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.11.0 -lpthread -lstdc++fs /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.11.0 /home/user/librerias/opencv_final/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.11.0
